(DEVICE FILE: BZX84C10SOT_0_SOD123_SMFJ75CA - used for device: 'BZX84C10/SOT_0_SOD123_SMFJ7.5CA')

PACKAGE SOD123
CLASS IC
PINCOUNT 2

PINORDER 'BZX84C10/SOT_0_SOD123_SMFJ7.5CA' ANODE CATHODE
FUNCTION G1 'BZX84C10/SOT_0_SOD123_SMFJ7.5CA' 1 2

PACKAGEPROP PART_NAME BZX84C10/SOT_0
PACKAGEPROP VALUE 'SMFJ7.5CA'

END
